tags.name: Hooks
tags.description: Hook enables you to effortlessly receive real-time updates regarding specific events, such as user registration, sign-in, or password reset. See [🪝 Webhooks] to get started and learn more.

get.description: Get a list of hooks with optional pagination.

parameters.name: includeExecutionStats
parameters.description: Whether to include execution stats in the response.

post.description: Create a new hook with the given data.

retries.description: Now the retry times is fixed to 3. Keep for backward compatibility.

parameters.name: includeExecutionStats
parameters.description: Whether to include execution stats in the response.

patch.description: Update hook details by ID with the given data.

name.description: The updated name of the hook.

events.description: An array of updated hook events.

retries.description: Now the retry times is fixed to 3. Keep for backward compatibility.

get.summary: Get recent logs for a hook
get.description: Get recent logs that match the given query for the specified hook with pagination. See `GET /api/logs` for details on the `enableCap` parameter and capped-response headers.

parameters.name: logKey
parameters.description: The log key to filter logs.

parameters.name: enableCap
parameters.description: When `true`, short-circuits the underlying `count(*)` query: results with more than 10,000 matching logs saturate `Total-Number` at the sentinel `10001` and emit `Total-Number-Is-Capped: true`; the `Link` header omits `rel="last"` and `rel="next"`. Default `false`. (This endpoint is already scoped to a single hook over the last 24 hours, so the cap rarely triggers in practice.)

200.description: A list of recent logs for the hook.

Total-Number.description: When `enableCap=false`: exact match count. When `enableCap=true`: either the exact count (≤ 10,000) or the saturation sentinel `10001`.

Total-Number-Is-Capped.description: Present and set to `true` only when `enableCap=true` and the result has more than 10,000 matching logs (in which case `Total-Number` is `10001`).

Link.description: Pagination links per RFC 5988. When the response is capped, `rel="last"` and `rel="next"` are omitted; walk forward by incrementing `page` and stop on an empty response.

post.description: Test the specified hook with the given events and config.

events.description: An array of hook events for testing.

retries.description: Now the retry times is fixed to 3. Keep for backward compatibility.

patch.summary: Update signing key for a hook
patch.description: Update the signing key for the specified hook.

200.description: The signing key for the hook was updated successfully.
